content.scenarioHint: 在团队会议中，你听到同事提到‘我们下周提交报告’，但不确定具体是哪一天，你想礼貌地澄清具体日期。
expectedAnswers: Just to clarify, do you mean we submit the report on Monday or Friday next week?
Could I just check—when you say 'next week,' are you referring to the beginning or the end of the week?
Sorry to interrupt, but could we confirm the exact day for the report submission?
To make sure I’ve got this right, is the deadline Friday next week?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了想确认具体时间的意图
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态和用词无误
表达自然度：是否使用了礼貌打断的常见表达（如 just to clarify, could I just check）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'clarify', 'next week', 'exact day' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I heard you say we need to submit the budget by the end of the month. Can you be more specific?
content.speakerTextCn: 我听到你说我们需要在月底前提交预算，你能更具体一点吗？
expectedAnswers: Just to clarify, do you mean the 30th or the 28th?
Sorry to cut in, but could you confirm if it's the last day of the month?
Let me make sure I got this—does 'end of the month' mean the 30th?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确请求澄清模糊的时间表达
语言准确性：正确使用了礼貌打断结构和疑问句式
表达自然度：语气礼貌、不生硬，符合职场沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'just to clarify', 'sorry to interrupt', 'let me make sure' 等关键表达
